ReceiverTumorSenderFOXP3_CD4_TregTumorExtended material - Figure 4
The Multinichenetr predicted ligand-receptor interactions distinguishing high and low MHCII tumor expression in scRNA-seq dataset. Circosplots displayligand–receptor pairs prioritized byMultinichenetr–bothimmune–tumorand tumor–tumor cellinteractions.

ng high and low MHCII tumor expression in scRNA-seq dataset. Circosplots displayligand–receptor pairs prioritized byMultinichenetr–bothimmune–tumorand tumor–tumor cellinteractions. Immunecells (CD8+ T cells, CD4+ T cells, FOXP3+ regulatory T cells, and dendritic cells (DC)) are shown in orange, while tumor cellsareshownin yellow.Eachplot displays the presence of ligand-receptor interactions, indicating whether they are associated with high or low cancer MHCII expression in the samples.
